author: fiddlestix27
description: Performs comprehensive social network analysis on your graph view, including various centrality measures, directional analysis, and graph layout customization. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: fiddlestix27
manifest.description: Performs comprehensive social network analysis on your graph view, including various centrality measures, directional analysis, and graph layout customization.
manifest.name: Social Network Analysis

name: Social Network Analysis

releases.author: fiddlestix27
releases.description:
Updated dependencies to latest stable releases
Added eslint.config.mjs for cleaner linting
Awaited updates:
    layout customization
    narrow by path or grouping (adjust SNA calculations by current view)
    left vs right eigenvector specifications when directional analysis is enabled
    fix auto export
releases.name: Updated Dev Build

releases.author: fiddlestix27
releases.description:
Initial release with standard SNA functionality ready for public listing as a community plugin.

Components to be added in future releases:
- layout changes
- narrow by path or grouping (adjust SNA calculations by current view)
- left vs right eigenvector specifications when directional analysis is enabled

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/fiddlestix27/Obsidian-SNA/commits/1.0.0
releases.name: Initial Release
